content: That sounds like a very workable middle ground, David. Keeping two or three threads visible gives you quick flexibility without overwhelming the sidebar — a kind of “current workspace” you can move among. When any thread feels complete or drifts too far from the present focus, just press-and-hold → **Archive**, and you’re right back to your clean triad. It’s the same principle as keeping a few open notebooks on your desk — one for active work, one for reference, one for experiments — while the rest stay shelved.
